old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.5","title":"get_vapid_public_key called redundantly in every handler","description":"File: src/api.rs and src/push.rs. get_vapid_public_key(pool) is called in create_app, verify_app_credentials, instance_v1, instance_v2, and inside push subscription create/get. Each call hits the DB. Since the VAPID key is immutable once created, it should be loaded once at startup and stored in AppState.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:53.481070924Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:53.481070924Z","labels":["efficiency","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.5","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:53.509285175Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
